# Sanitized structural-scan sample tree.
d Mixed Suite
f Mixed Suite/edit.prproj
d Mixed Suite/Nested AE
f Mixed Suite/Nested AE/comp.aep
d Mixed Suite/Autosaves
f Mixed Suite/Autosaves/edit_autosave.prproj
d Mixed Suite/Cache
f Mixed Suite/Cache/render.tmp
d Premiere Only
f Premiere Only/main.prproj
d Resolve Only
f Resolve Only/color.drp
d Neutral Exchange
f Neutral Exchange/sequence.xml
f Neutral Exchange/timeline.aaf
f README.txt
